name: Small Pleated Lamp Shade White - Threshold™: Empire Shape, Cotton/Nylon, 7" H
description:
Add a decorative hint of dimension to your table lamp with this Small Pleated Lamp Shade from Threshold™. This empire-shaped lamp shade features allover knife pleating for a refined classic look. This white fabric shade diffuses light with a soft glow, and easily coordinates with any lamp base or decor scheme. Simply pair it with a small-sized lamp base to cast and warm and welcoming glow.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.

Lamp Shade Bottom Diameter: 10 inches
Lamp Shade Top Diameter: 5.5 inches
Lamp Shade Height: 7 inches
